'''lacholo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oospecies|oospecies]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ch-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oospecies|oospecies]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lacholo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læcheleth|læcheleth]] || [[word:læchelej|læchelej]] || [[word:læchelesh|læchelesh]] || [[word:læchele|læchele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lachocholoth|lachocholoth]] || [[word:lachocholoj|lachocholoj]] || [[word:lachocholosh|lachocholosh]] || [[word:lachocholo|lachocholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lacholoth|lacholoth]] || [[word:lacholoj|lacholoj]] || [[word:lacholosh|lacholosh]] || [[word:lacholo|lacholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lachofloth|lachofloth]] || [[word:lachofloj|lachofloj]] || [[word:lachoflosh|lachoflosh]] || [[word:lachoflof|lachoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lacholotho|lacholotho]] || [[word:lacholojo|lacholojo]] || [[word:lacholosho|lacholosho]] || [[word:lacholoko|lacholoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lacholoth|lacholoth]] || [[word:lacholoj|lacholoj]] || [[word:lacholosh|lacholosh]] || [[word:lacholo|lacholo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lacholothol|lacholothol]] || [[word:lacholojol|lacholojol]] || [[word:lacholoshol|lacholoshol]] || [[word:lacholokol|lacholokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lacholothotho|lacholothotho]] || [[word:lacholojojo|lacholojojo]] || [[word:lacholoshosho|lacholoshosho]] || [[word:lacholoko|lacholoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lacholothon|lacholothon]] || [[word:lacholojon|lacholojon]] || [[word:lacholoshon|lacholoshon]] || [[word:lacholokon|lacholokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lacholothoro|lacholothoro]] || [[word:lacholojoro|lacholojoro]] || [[word:lacholoshoro|lacholoshoro]] || [[word:lacholokoro|lacholokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
